HEXAGHOST-BOLSTERING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Bolstering Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-BOLSTERING_GHOSTFLAME.descript:
[gold]Ignites[/gold] by playing [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Power[/gold] while on it. 
You gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-CRUSHING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Crushing Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-CRUSHING_GHOSTFLAME.descriptio:
[gold]Ignites[/gold] by playing [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Skills[/gold] while on it. 
Deals [blue]3[/blue] damage to a random enemy twice.
HEXAGHOST-INFERNO_GHOSTFLAME.title: Inferno Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-INFERNO_GHOSTFLAME.description:
[gold]Ignites[/gold] by spending [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] while on it.
Deals [blue]4[/blue] damage to a random enemy for each ignited Ghostflame.
If all Ghostflames are [gold]Ignited[/gold], gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Intensity[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-SEARING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Searing Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-SEARING_GHOSTFLAME.description:
[gold]Ignites[/gold] by playing [blue]2[/blue] Attacks while on it.
Applies [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to a random enemy twice.
